failedAssertions.reason: WiFiMeasurementEngine.buildMeasurementPoint() always sets linkSpeed: nil. While CoreWLANService.currentLinkSpeed() reads from CWInterface.transmitRate() and works, the WiFiInfo model returned by WiFiInfoServiceProtocol lacks a linkSpeed field, so it's never wired into measurement points. Fix: add linkSpeed to WiFiInfo struct and bridge from CoreWLANService through WiFiMeasurementEngine.

takeMeasurement() silently adds a garbage point (RSSI=-100, nil SSID) when Wi-Fi is disconnected instead of showing an error. WiFiMeasurementEngine.buildMeasurementPoint() uses 'wifiInfo?.signalDBm ?? -100' fallback. No validation in ViewModel to detect disconnected state. Fix: ViewModel should check if measurement has nil SSID or RSSI==-100 and call showError() instead of adding the point.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance: macOS Heatmap section with app state, key source files, AppleScript navigation commands, and evidence standards for native macOS app testing

testingMethod: Code review + AppleScript UI automation + build verification. The macOS app was built fresh and launched. AppleScript confirmed sidebar navigation and heatmap view presence. 4 flow validator subagents performed detailed code review of all source files.
